<?php namespace Illuminate\Foundation\Events; class LocaleUpdated { /** * The new locale. * * @var string */ public $locale; /** * The previous locale. * * @var ?string */ public $previousLocale; /** * Create a new event instance. * * @param string $locale * @param ?string $previousLocale */ public function __construct($locale, $previousLocale = null) { $this->locale = $locale; $this->previousLocale = $previousLocale; } }
